intent: Minimum-feasible boundary test (wide-of-square (ratio 1.15) lot) for baths_ds_ld from the 2026-07-13 lot-size sweep (see floorplan_v1/LOT_SIZE_SWEEP_FINDINGS.md). 12.65x11.0 lot, 60.55 m2 floor -- smallest size in the tested grid that still solves + validates cleanly at this ratio. No carport.
